title: HeadsChat
description: Use the brand new "Object" chat feature of Minecraft 1.21.9 to add chat heads to player's messages!
body:
![HeadsChat's Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e5beba026f9674274a7a44dfd7006c22b63c6e6.png)

Ever wanted to add some *fancyness* to your minecraft chat ? **Now you can!** Using the 
`Object` text type introduced in 1.21.9, you can now show player's head before there messages in chat. **No ressource pacls & mods are required, this is pure vanilla!**

![HeadsChat preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5772aab4bbb38cdf837a48424c7f17c793f0bf2c.png)

## 🔥 **WARNING**
This plugin will only work for **[clients](#) after 1.21.9**, as it rely on a feature introduced in this version.

# Features
- Full Minimessage support
- Join/Leave message formating
- Mute players with the `headschat.mute` permission
- LIGHTWEIGHT (like **really**)
- Full Async (because why not)
- Clean logs output (no ugly json)

# Stats
[![Servers & Players](https://faststats.dev/embed/6ecfe049-3a2f-42be-a7a0-da4b83c4fa92?w=800&h=300&theme=dark)](https://faststats.dev/project/headschat/minecraft-plugin-(copy))
